Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_TRIANGLE

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_TRIANGLE: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_triangle#Discussion)

The effect represents a triangle force effect.
